name: smarzban
description: Saeed's single-plugin marketplace for review-gate (multi-model PR review gate + whole-repo audit).

plugins.name: review-gate
plugins.description: Multi-model PR review gate + whole-repo audit — two skills (review-gate, repo-audit) plus a deterministic CLI spine. Unversioned: tracks the repo's default-branch HEAD (git-SHA versioning), so every pushed commit is a new release.
